STIPULATION PERMITTING PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITYS MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100089896) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE WRITTEN RESPONSES ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 5, 2019 TO THE FOLLOWING WRITTEN DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ("SFHA"): FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE. PLAINTIFF SHALL FURTHER PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS REQUIRED TO BE PRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 5, 2019. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY JAMES BRADEN SHALL PAY TO SFHA ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 5, 2019 THE SUM OF $860 REPRESENTING SANCTIONS FOR DISCOVERY ABUSE. THE MOTION IS OTHERWISE DENIED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
The San Francisco Housing Authority's ("SFHA") motion for summary judgment is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2020 Continued To Oct-19-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Set For Trial On Jun-01-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mika J. Frisk, Esq., Cholakian & Associates, 650-871-6544, appearing for Defendant San Francisco Housing Authority;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions

Plaintiff filed a statement of non-opposition in which he concedes the motion to compel and agrees to an order compelling service of plaintiff's responses to written discovery no later than December 5, 2019 and awarding sanctions not to exceed $860 against attorney James Braden only. Accordingly, the motion is granted as follows: Plaintiff shall serve written responses on or before December 5, 2019 to the following written discovery propounded by defendant San Francisco Housing Authority ("SFHA"): Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; and Request for Production of Documents, Set One. Plaintiff shall further produce all documents required to be produced by plaintiff's responses on or before December 5, 2019. Plaintiff's attorney James Braden shall pay to SFHA on or before December 5, 2019 the sum of $860 representing sanctions for discovery abuse. The motion is otherwise denied.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
